SEARCH

Uses of Package
com.nib.supernaut.backbone

Packages that use com.nib.supernaut.backbone
Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.ati
Automatic Transaction Initiation (ATI) support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.backbone
Core infrastructure and distributed coordination interface for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.backbone.embedded
Embedded single-node implementation of Supernaut backbone.
com.nib.supernaut.queues
Transient Data (TD) and Temporary Storage (TS) queue management for Supernaut.
  • Classes in com.nib.supernaut.backbone used by com.nib.supernaut
    Class
    Description
    IBackboneBinaryStream
    The IBackboneBinaryStream interface provides a set of methods for managing a binary stream.
  • Classes in com.nib.supernaut.backbone used by com.nib.supernaut.ati
    Class
    Description
    IBackboneMessageListener
    The IBackboneMessageListener interface provides a method for handling messages of a specific type.
  • Classes in com.nib.supernaut.backbone used by com.nib.supernaut.backbone
    Class
    Description
    IBackboneAtomicLong
    The IBackboneAtomicLong interface provides a set of methods for managing an atomic long value.
    IBackboneBinaryStream
    The IBackboneBinaryStream interface provides a set of methods for managing a binary stream.
    IBackboneBucket
    The IBackboneBucket interface provides a set of methods for managing a bucket.
    IBackboneDeque
    The IBackboneDeque interface provides a set of methods for managing a double-ended queue (deque).
    IBackboneList
    The IBackboneList interface provides a set of methods for managing a list.
    IBackboneLock
    The IBackboneLock interface provides a set of methods for managing a lock.
    IBackboneMap
    The IBackboneMap interface provides a set of methods for managing a map.
    IBackboneMapCache
    The IBackboneMapCache interface provides a set of methods for managing a cached map.
    IBackboneMessageListener
    The IBackboneMessageListener interface provides a method for handling messages of a specific type.
    IBackboneMessageQueue
    The IBackboneMessageQueue interface provides a set of methods for managing a message queue.
    IBackboneObject
    The IBackboneObject interface provides a set of methods that are common to all backbone objects.
    IBackboneQueue
    The IBackboneQueue interface provides a set of methods for managing a queue.
    IBackboneScheduler
    The IBackboneScheduler interface provides a method for scheduling tasks.
    IBackboneTopic
